column1: # Tutorial Chapter 2, Lesson 7: graph data ranges, X-axis labels,
# graph type switching, viewing, and saving the current graph.
# Unsupported tutorial graph subflows intentionally not covered here:
# graph titles, legends, options, Group, and named graphs.
# Name the graph data and X-label ranges so the graph commands can use
# F3 NAMES selection from their POINT prompts.
# /Graph A selects the COG data range B13..E13 via F3 NAMES.
# /Graph X selects the quarter labels B3..E3 via F3 NAMES.
# Switch to Bar, view the graph, return, then switch back to Line.
# Save writes an SVG representation of the current graph.
